name: Greek Garbanzo & Chick-Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and soak chick-peas according to package directions. Drain and sprinkle with salt. Let stand for 15 minutes.
2. Remove husks by rubbing the chick-peas between thumb and forefinger. Rinse well and drain.
3. Heat olive oil in a large pot. Sauté onions until translucent, stirring with a wooden spoon.
4. Add peas and stir over low heat for 2-3 minutes.
5. Add tomatoes, bay leaf, garlic, salt, and pepper to the pot. Pour in 6 cups of water.
6. Cover and bring mixture to a boil. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for 1 to 1 1/2 hours or longer until peas are tender.
7. If necessary, add more water to achieve desired consistency.
8. Remove from heat and discard the bay leaf. Stir in lemon juice.
